name: Read Surface Parity and Documentation Polish Gate
decision: Tighten the existing Go read-only notes search parity for DB-backed attachment metadata and document the remaining Python-owned text attachment body search gap.

parity_changes.change: Go read-only runtime now includes Note_Attachments.title and Note_Attachments.file_path in the existing notes search WHERE clause.
parity_changes.reason: Python GET /api/notes already searches attachment metadata through SQL; this closes a DB-only parity gap without file access or route expansion.
parity_changes.fixture: tests/test_phase18_go_shadow_contract.py seeds attachment-meta-canary in Note_Attachments and includes it in the Python vs Go response diff matrix.

documented_gaps.python_behavior: Python GET /api/notes?q=... scans text attachment file bodies (.md, .markdown, .txt) in a request-time read-only pass and merges matching note_id values into the SQL query.
documented_gaps.go_behavior_after_20_3: Go does not scan attachment file bodies. It remains limited to SQLite query_only DB reads for the hardened read surface.
documented_gaps.decision: Keep text attachment body search Python-owned until a separate file-read parity contract is explicitly approved.
documented_gaps.not_implemented_reason: Adding file body scan would expand Go beyond DB-only read parity and needs data-dir/path safety, file type, performance, and rollback documentation.

verified_fixture_matrix: GET /api/notes tag OR and AND filters

python: All POST / PUT / DELETE / PATCH routes
Files, uploads, attachments endpoints, cleanup, import/export, frontend/static assets, and migrations

not_authorized_by_20_3: Caddy route expansion beyond the validated GET read surface
Changing prism-go-readonly.service away from SQLite query_only
Live Pi service or Caddy reload

result.conclusion: 20.3 closes a DB-only attachment metadata search parity gap and documents text attachment body search as Python-owned. It does not expand runtime ownership, Caddy routes, service mode, frontend defaults, or public exposure.

allowed_next_step.title: Post-polish Stabilization and Candidate Closure Gate
allowed_next_step.scope: Plan-only stabilization review after 20.3. It may decide to close Phase 20 or plan a separately approved file-read parity assessment. It must not implement Go writes/files/migrations, expand Caddy routes, disable query_only, change frontend defaults, remove Python, reload live services, or broaden public exposure.
not_authorized_without_approval: Caddy route expansion beyond the validated GET read surface
Changing prism-go-readonly.service away from SQLite query_only
Live Pi service or Caddy reload
